description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, symmetrical blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears metallic and uniform in color, with no visible serrations or decorative features. The crossguard is straight and extends horizontally, providing protection for the wielder's hand. The handle is cylindrical and simple, lacking any visible wrapping, texturing, or pommel detail. The entire object is a consistent metallic gray, suggesting it is forged from a single material. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or ornamentation, and no sheath is present.
description: A straight, double-edged metallic sword with a simple crossguard and plain cylindrical handle, all in a uniform gray color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge profile of the sword.
